description: Task A5: Create AnalyzerProvider SPI draft types including evidence edge types, EvidenceBundle, AnalyzerCapabilities, and the AnalyzerProvider interface. Depends on A1 (TargetId), A3 (CanonicalLocator), and A4 (GovernanceProfile).
steps: Step 2 - Create AnalyzerId.java at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/analyzer/AnalyzerId.java as a record wrapping String id.

Step 3 - Create AnalysisOptions.java at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/analyzer/AnalysisOptions.java as a record with fields: boolean includeReferences, int maxDepth. Add static factory defaults() returning new AnalysisOptions(false, 1).

Step 4 - Create ImportEdge.java at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/analyzer/ImportEdge.java as record with fields: String sourceModule, String targetModule, String specifier, CanonicalLocator locator. Import CanonicalLocator from locator package.
Step 5 - Create DependencyEdge.java at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/analyzer/DependencyEdge.java as record with fields: String packageName, String version, String scope.
Step 6 - Create OwnershipFact.java at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/analyzer/OwnershipFact.java as record with fields: String module, String ownerBlock, CanonicalLocator locator.

Step 7 - Create ReferenceEdge.java at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/analyzer/ReferenceEdge.java as record with fields: String sourceSymbol, String targetSymbol, CanonicalLocator locator.
Step 8 - Create AnalyzerFinding.java at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/analyzer/AnalyzerFinding.java as record with fields: String code, String message, CanonicalLocator locator.

Step 9 - Create EvidenceBundle.java at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/analyzer/EvidenceBundle.java as record with fields: List<ImportEdge> imports, List<DependencyEdge> dependencies, List<OwnershipFact> ownership, List<ReferenceEdge> references, List<AnalyzerFinding> findings. Add static factory empty() returning new EvidenceBundle with all List.of() empty lists.

Step 10 - Create AnalyzerCapabilities.java at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/analyzer/AnalyzerCapabilities.java as record with fields: boolean supportsImports, boolean supportsDependencies, boolean supportsOwnership, boolean supportsSymbols, boolean supportsSpans, boolean supportsReferences. Static factories: all() returns all-true, none() returns all-false.

Step 11 - Create AnalyzerProvider.java interface at kernel/src/main/java/com/bear/kernel/target/analyzer/AnalyzerProvider.java with methods: AnalyzerId analyzerId(); AnalyzerCapabilities capabilities(); boolean supports(TargetId targetId, GovernanceProfile profile); EvidenceBundle collectEvidence(Path projectRoot, List<Path> governedRoots, AnalysisOptions options). Import TargetId and GovernanceProfile from parent package.

Step 12 - Create unit test AnalyzerProviderTypesTest.java at kernel/src/test/java/com/bear/kernel/AnalyzerProviderTypesTest.java. Tests: (a) EvidenceBundle.empty() returns bundle with all empty lists; (b) EvidenceBundle with populated ImportEdge, DependencyEdge, OwnershipFact lists; (c) AnalyzerId equality (same id equals, different id not equals); (d) AnalyzerCapabilities.all() returns all true; (e) AnalyzerCapabilities.none() returns all false; (f) AnalysisOptions.defaults() returns includeReferences=false, maxDepth=1; (g) ImportEdge construction with CanonicalLocator; (h) AnalyzerFinding construction.
acceptance_criteria: All analyzer types compile successfully with javac 17
AnalyzerProvider interface has correct method signatures: analyzerId(), capabilities(), supports(TargetId, GovernanceProfile), collectEvidence(Path, List<Path>, AnalysisOptions)
EvidenceBundle.empty() returns bundle with all empty lists
AnalyzerCapabilities.all() returns all-true, none() returns all-false
Evidence types (ImportEdge, DependencyEdge, etc.) use CanonicalLocator from A3 where appropriate
No existing code paths are modified -- all additive new files
Test file compiles and covers key construction and factory method scenarios
verification: Compile all new source files in the analyzer/ package with javac 17
Verify imports resolve correctly to CanonicalLocator, GovernanceProfile, TargetId
findings: All 10 source files in analyzer/ package compile successfully with javac 17. Test file compiles except for expected JUnit 5 import errors (no JUnit jar available in INTEGRATIONS_ONLY). All internal imports (CanonicalLocator, LocatorSymbol, SymbolKind, TargetId, GovernanceProfile) resolve correctly.
